dos: Prioritize Orchid Bloom (#e57cd8) for primary calls to action, active states, and elements requiring significant visual emphasis.
Use Midnight Plum (#412a4c) for major text elements, hero section backgrounds, and defining container fills.
Employ GT Haptik Medium for all headlines, using GT Haptik Medium Rotalic for emphasis on key words within headings.
Maintain a default border-radius of 10px for cards and general containers, extending to 26px for most buttons and 200px for fully rounded buttons.
Separate content sections with White Canvas (#fefbfa) and Frost Haze (#fcf1f8) backgrounds to create visual breaks without hard lines.
Utilize Inter for all body copy, links, and functional UI elements to ensure consistent readability.
Ensure generous internal padding for all cards, standardizing around 15px to 30px depending on prominence, and a default element gap of 10px.
donts: Avoid using multiple accent colors; confine strong saturation to Orchid Bloom (#e57cd8) to maintain visual hierarchy.
Do not introduce heavy drop shadows or excessive elevation; rely on varied background colors and subtle borders for surface distinction.
Do not deviate from the specified GT Haptik fonts for headlines; generic sans-serif alternatives will compromise brand identity.
Do not use highly saturated colors for large text blocks; reserve them for accents and calls to action.
Avoid tight spacing in cards and between elements; maintain a comfortable density for an approachable feel.
Do not use dark backgrounds without providing sufficient contrast for text and interactive elements; ensure readability against deeper tones like Regal Violet (#2c1338).
Do not use square corners; ensure all interactive elements and content containers have a degree of roundedness, with a minimum of 8px for small elements.

colors.name: Midnight Plum
colors.role: Primary surface background, dark text on light backgrounds, hero background, accent text

colors.name: Regal Violet
colors.role: Deep background for hero sections and footers; strong contrast text/borders

colors.name: Orchid Bloom
colors.role: Primary action buttons, prominent icons, active states, and decorative heading accents

colors.name: Misty Mauve
colors.role: Muted body text, secondary links, and subtle icon detailing against light surfaces

colors.name: Slate Echo
colors.role: Supporting text, minor borders, and list item separators

colors.name: Pebble Gray
colors.role: Ghost button borders and text, subtle body text for less emphasis

colors.name: Sunbeam Yellow
colors.role: Yellow action color for filled buttons, selected navigation states, and focused conversion moments

colors.name: White Canvas
colors.role: Hairline borders, dividers, input outlines, and card edges on light surfaces. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

colors.name: Frost Haze
colors.role: Secondary card backgrounds, subtle distinction from primary canvas

colors.name: Lilac Mist
colors.role: Tertiary card backgrounds, internal container fills, offers slight tint

colors.name: Lavender Whisper
colors.role: Subtle card backgrounds to suggest hierarchy, used sparingly

colors.name: Powder Pink
colors.role: Decorative accents or very light background fills

colors.name: Onyx
colors.role: Primary text color, strong borders, and contrast elements

colors.name: Cloud Burst
colors.role: Divider lines, subtle borders, and placeholder text

colors.name: Soft Stone
colors.role: Very subtle borders and dividers, indicating a soft separation

designSystem.layout: The page uses a contained layout with no explicit global max-width, allowing content to stretch broader than typical. The hero section is full-bleed with a deep Regal Violet (#2c1338) background, featuring a large, centered headline and primary actions. Subsequent sections generally alternate between White Canvas (#fefbfa) and Frost Haze (#fcf1f8) backgrounds, creating a clear vertical rhythm. Content is arranged in alternating text-left/image-right and image-left/text-right patterns, often using two-column structures. Card grids are prevalent, displaying features and integrations in a flexible layout. Navigation is a sticky top bar with a primary 'Try for free' button and secondary links.
designSystem.imagery: The site primarily uses abstract, simplified 2D illustrations with a strong focus on product UI elements and data visualization examples. Illustrations are geometric, outlined in various shades of the brand's violet tones, and often feature small product screenshots or abstract representations of devices. Iconography is filled or outlined with medium stroke weight, in monochromatic or subtly tinted violet. Imagery serves an explanatory and atmospheric role, showcasing product functionality in context without relying on photography or complex 3D renders. Density is moderate, balancing text-heavy sections with illustrative accents.

similar.why: Clear time-tracking focus, SaaS layout with distinct sections, and a balance of informational and action-oriented content.
Productivity tool with a clean, light UI, purposeful use of color accents for interaction, and strong infographic-style illustrations.
Emphasizes a flexible content structure, a clean aesthetic with rounded elements, and a blend of functional and illustrative visuals.
Focus on highly functional, minimalist UI with strategic use of purple/violet accents, contrasting effectively with a light background.

surfaces.name: White Canvas
surfaces.purpose: Dominant page background, providing a clean base.

surfaces.name: Frost Haze
surfaces.purpose: Secondary background for cards and slightly elevated content blocks, creating subtle segmentation.

surfaces.name: Lilac Mist
surfaces.purpose: Tertiary background for more distinct content areas or components within Frost Haze surfaces.

surfaces.name: Lavender Whisper
surfaces.purpose: Higher elevation surface for specific cards or modals, providing a stronger visual lift without shadows.

components.name: Primary Action Button
components.role: Calls to action, emphasizing core user journeys.
components.description: Filled with Orchid Bloom (#e57cd8), white text, 26px border-radius, 14px vertical padding and 25px horizontal padding. Font: Inter Bold.

components.name: Ghost Action Button
components.role: Secondary actions that should not compete with the primary call to action.
components.description: Transparent background, Pebble Gray (#817187) text and 1px border, 200px border-radius, 9-12px vertical padding and 18px horizontal padding. Font: Inter Regular.

components.name: Navigation Link Button
components.role: Navigation items within the primary header, appearing as a ghost button.
components.description: Transparent background, Pebble Gray (#817187) text and 1px border, 26px border-radius, 12px vertical padding and 18px horizontal padding. Font: Inter Regular.

components.name: Inline Text Link
components.role: Navigational links embedded within body text or footer, designed to be understated.
components.description: Transparent background, White Canvas (#fefbfa) text, no border or explicit padding beyond text flow. Used on darker backgrounds.

components.name: Default Card
components.role: Containers for features, info blocks, and grouped content.
components.description: White Canvas (#fefbfa) background, 15px border-radius, 15px internal padding. No shadow.

components.name: Elevated Feature Card
components.role: Prominent information blocks, drawing more attention than default cards.
components.description: Frost Haze (#fcf1f8) background, 10px border-radius, 35px top padding, 30px other padding. No shadow.

components.name: Accent Card
components.role: Cards for special content or promotions, using a subtle background tint.
components.description: Lilac Mist (#fdeae2) background, 14px border-radius, 20px vertical padding, 30px horizontal padding. No shadow.

components.name: Promotional Card
components.role: Higher emphasis promotional content, using a slightly deeper background tint.
components.description: Lavender Whisper (#fae5f7) background, 12px border-radius, 30px top padding, 30px horizontal padding, 35px bottom padding. No shadow.

typography.role: Distinctive headlines and subheadings, brand emphasis. Its heavier weight provides immediate visual presence.
Accentuated words within headlines, creating a unique visual rhythm and drawing attention to key terms.
Primary typeface for body text, links, buttons, and all functional UI elements. Its clean, utilitarian nature supports readability across all sizes and contexts.

designSystem.description: Toggl Track employs a playful yet professional aesthetic, characterized by a predominantly light theme with deep violet accents for structure and emphasis. Interactive elements pop with a vibrant 'Orchid Bloom' color, lending a dynamic and engaging feel to the user interface. Typography balances crisp readability with distinct, branded headlines, while generous internal padding and rounded corners contribute to a soft, approachable component style. The system leverages subtle surface variations to define hierarchy rather than heavy shadows.

customSections.title: Agent Prompt Guide
customSections.content:
Quick Color Reference:
- text: #000000
- background: #fefbfa
- border: #d5d0d7
- accent: #e57cd8
- primary action: #e57cd8 (filled action)

Example Component Prompts:
- Create a Primary Action Button: #e57cd8 background, #000000 text, 9999px radius, compact pill padding. Use this filled treatment for the main CTA.
- Design a feature card: Frost Haze background (#fcf1f8), 10px radius, 35px top padding, 30px other padding. Use Inter Semibold 18px for the title and Inter Regular 14px for description text, both in Midnight Plum (#412a4c).
- Construct a footer section: Regal Violet background (#2c1338), text links in White Canvas (#fefbfa) using Inter Regular 14px, with 10px element gap between links.
